reason_for_revision: Original draft fabricated a lead-nurture capability ('watches for buying signals before close') Dossie does not have. Dossie is post-contract transaction coordination only. Honest re-draft addresses the OP's real emotional content first, names the operational truth about her two specific losses, then mentions Dossie with accurate capability scope and explicit disclosure.
op_post_title: Why am I losing leads/ clients?

seven_day_success_criteria: Did this comment drive a Dossie search OR signup within 7 days? Atlas to flag if OP or any commenter on this thread signs up.
